name: @hrkit/starter-rn
description: React Native starter source template for @hrkit BLE heart rate monitoring (copy src/ into your own Expo app)

scripts.start:
node -e "console.log('
@hrkit/starter-rn is a SOURCE TEMPLATE, not a runnable app.

To use it:
  1. Create a new Expo dev build: npx create-expo-app@latest my-app --template blank-typescript
  2. Install: npm install @hrkit/core @hrkit/react-native react-native-ble-plx expo-dev-client
  3. Copy src/ into your project.

Full instructions: ./README.md
')"
